chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1338 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA-11351/19. 02.12.2019. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Mirbahar, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl:A.G = The instant petition was dismissed by this Court on 28.08.2019 for non-prosecution. The restoration whereof is sought for by the petitioner by way of listed application, which is filed on 25.10.2019. It is filed much after expiry of 30 days’ time, which is prescribed by Article-163 of Limitation Act. No application under Section-5 of the Limitation Act for condoning such delay is filed by the petitioner. Consequently, the listed application is dismissed being time barred. [[ JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
